parts.content: how can I enroll to a course?

parts.content:
To enroll in a course, you first need to visit the Datatalks Club website. Here is how you can do it:

1. Go to the Datatalks Club main page: [Datatalks Club Homepage](https://www.datatalksclub.com/)
2. Click on the "Courses" tab at the top of the page.
3. Browse through the list of available courses and choose the one you are interested in.
4. Once you find a course you want to enroll in, click on its tile and go to the course's landing page.
5. You will find the "Enroll Now" button on the top right corner of the course page. Click it.
6. After clicking the "Enroll Now" button, you will be redirected to the Teachable platform where Datatalks Club courses are hosted.
7. Simply follow the instructions on the screen to complete the enrollment process and begin your journey with a new course!

That's it! You have successfully enrolled in a Datatalks Club course. Remember that you can always check the FAQ section for help whenever you need it. [Datatalks Club FAQ](https://github.com/DataTalksClub/faq/blob/main/index.md)

I hope this helps! Let me know if you have any other questions.
